title: indoor_upscale_apartment
prompts: A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. In a spacious master bedroom with a king-size bed with crisp white high-thread-count linens and a charcoal cashmere throw at the foot, a pair of matching walnut nightstands with sleek modern ceramic lamps, a large abstract art piece in muted tones above the bed, floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer white drapes revealing a city skyline, pale oak wide-plank flooring, a plush cream area rug, a leather bench at the foot of the bed. Early dawn pale blue-lavender light filtering through the floor-to-ceiling windows casting cool soft shadows across the white linens. She is wearing a white oversized cashmere sweater that barely covers her thighs with no bottoms visible and a nude seamless thong underneath, small gold hoop earrings. Lying on the bed with phone held above, hair spread across the white sheets, head tilted back against the headboard with eyes half-shut, a composed blank gaze directed upward through the lens, fingertips resting on her exposed collarbone, the lavender pre-dawn glow giving her skin a cool luminous quality.
